accessNotes.en: O dimotikos odigos Psaron tin katatassei stis gnostes kai evkola prosvasimes paralies, eno to Exploring Greece katagrafei prosvasi me dromo kai chomatodromo.
accessNotes.gr: Ο δημοτικός οδηγός Ψαρών την κατατάσσει στις γνωστές και εύκολα προσβάσιμες παραλίες, ενώ το Exploring Greece καταγράφει πρόσβαση με δρόμο και χωματόδρομο.

sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 52 2026-05-28: All Over Greece directly names Paralia Archontiki on Psara, supporting identity/location traceability only. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: the Municipality of Psara guide lists Archontiki among the island’s known/easily accessible beaches, and Exploring Greece directly supports Archontiki as the northern part of Lakka with sand/fine pebbles, rocky seabed context, normal depth, no organization, and road/dirt-road access. Removed unsupported seasonal canteen/taverna/parking claims. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Popular source upgrade 2026-06-02: AllOverGreece supports Lakka as a large sandy beach on Psara with very easy access from the road toward the wind park and coordinates matching the stored point.
Exploring Greece supports Lakka as the island’s largest open sandy beach, with sand/small pebbles, no organization, normal depth, road/dirt-road access, and normal accessibility.
The Municipality of Psara guide lists Lakka among the best-known and easily accessible beaches of Psara. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, and live-condition claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Psara OSM identity/location pass 2026-05-27: OpenStreetMap natural=beach same-name match is 0m from stored coordinates and supports identity/location only.

Next popular-region confidence pass 2026-06-02: the Psara municipal tourism page directly supports Lazareta identity, south-side location, sandy terrain, relatively shallow water, and access by vehicle or short walk from the settlement. AllOverGreece and Exploring Greece independently support the same beach identity, easy access, sandy character, limited/no shade, and unorganized status. Promoted to high for static metadata only; no windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3E source check 2026-05-25: AllOverGreece backs Psili Ammos on Antipsara as boat-only access from Psara, unorganized and without tourist infrastructure; keep boat-only wording.
AllOverGreece supports Psili Ammos on Antipsara/Psara as a sandy boat-access beach with no organization, no shade and no tourist infrastructure nearby.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: promoted to high for static beach facts only after reviewing direct beach/source coverage for recorded access, terrain, shade and service context. Source scenic/calm/clear/wave wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live condition claims.
